name: small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient billing reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate client billing reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient billing reconciliation leading to cash flow gaps
